- change the direction of searching, see DIR SEARCH.
- restrict searching to a range of lines, see RANGE SEARCH.
- affect searching by whether lines are currently `excluded` or
- cause searching in columns other than that currently specified
in the BOUNDS command, see COLUMN SEARCH.
CHANGE parameters are free form and may be entered in any order. The
only exceptions are: If entered, col2 must follow col1.  Str2 must
follow str1.  Str1 and str2 are required; all other parameters are

shift characters on the right of the string.  In doing this, it will
